title: A bill to reduce small business tax burdens
summary: This bill updates tax credits and trade relief for small business growth.

title: A bill to expand rural hospital and mental health services
summary: The bill strengthens hospital access and mental health support in underserved communities.

summary: This bill funds teacher training, school workforce grants, and student support programs.

summary: The bill funds clean energy deployment, climate resilience, and wildfire mitigation.
committee: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources

title: A bill to strengthen military readiness and foreign aid coordination
summary: The legislation supports defense readiness, alliances, and foreign aid oversight.

title: A bill to improve border screening and asylum processing
summary: The bill updates border technology, immigration screening, and asylum case management.

summary: This bill supports law enforcement, sentencing tools, and anti-trafficking crime investigations.

summary: The legislation funds bridge repair, broadband deployment, and transit modernization.

summary: This bill is used for a motion to recommit fixture.

summary: This bill renames a local museum plaza.
